title: prompt_diff

removed_noise.description: Filler phrases or redundant connectors removed from the original.

rewritten_phrases.description: Phrases that were rewritten with the reason for the change.

unresolved_conflicts.description: Blocking conflicts surfaced but not auto-resolved. User must decide.

preserved_constraints.description: All user-stated constraints that were kept unchanged.

warnings.description: Non-blocking notices: inferred fields, medium complexity, sensitivity advisory.

x-hard_rules: diff is required whenever cleaned_prompt differs from raw_prompt
every removed phrase must appear in removed_noise
every rewritten phrase must appear in rewritten_phrases with a reason
every auto-resolved warning-level conflict must appear in resolved_conflicts
every unresolved blocking conflict must appear in unresolved_conflicts
preserved_constraints must list all user-stated constraints kept unchanged
all six arrays are required even if empty
